_comment: Metriques par cycle -- remplace METRICS.md. Ecrit par merlin-qa-lead apres chaque cycle.
notes: Cycle 8 FINAL CONTENT: +2 minigames (regard: memory sequence 3 rounds x 4/5/6 symbols, 5x3 grid, score = correct/total*100; echo: visual sound-direction 6 rounds x 1.2s window, 4 quadrants, score = hits/rounds*100). 14/14 minigames COMPLETE. +40 FastRoute cards (20 collines_dolmens: passage tombs, ancestor visions, hilltop fires, territorial oaths; 20 iles_mystiques: Avalon, selkies, faery ferrymen, time-lost islands, sacred apple orchards). 166 card templates total (126+40). All caps respected (rep<=10, heal<=7, dmg<=5). Druides capped at 4/20 in collines. Niamh emphasized at 14/20 options in iles. Field quotas met: chance>=4, bluff>=3, obs>=3, logique>=3, finesse>=3, vigueur>=3, esprit<=8, perception>=3 per 20-card batch. App bundle 283KB (index 223KB + minigames 60KB), under 310KB WARN threshold.
